public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as internal skeptic.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a internal skeptic still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of internal skeptic in and around Shadowhands, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shadowhands workable through the obligations of internal skeptic while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Shadowhands, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of internal skeptic visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kest Hart needs help with a problem in Shadowhands that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Kest Hart can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Kest Hart carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shadowhands: the part of Shadowhands where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
